title: Fake Web Article
description: Shared article schema for every simulated fake-web React site used by Dockie's web_search tool.

id.description: Stable article identifier unique within the source corpus.

title.description: Human-readable article title shown in search results and article pages.

url.description: Canonical public URL for the article on the deployed fake website.

published.description: Original publication date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

updated.description: Last updated date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

source.description: Display name of the website or publication.

source_type.description: Source-specific content class such as carrier_schedule, berth_notice, or compliance_guide.

tags.description: Searchable free-form keywords used for routing and ranking.

body.description: Full article text used for snippet generation and simulated article detail pages.
